# Nina Li — Full-Stack Engineer

Full-stack software engineer specialising in modern web applications with a focus on Next.js, TypeScript, and performance optimisation. Based in Stockholm, Sweden.

## Current Role

Software Engineer (Intern), Cabonline Group AB — Stockholm  
Working on large-scale web platform consolidation and modern frontend architecture.

## Core Skills

Frontend:
- Next.js (App Router), React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS
- Core Web Vitals optimisation (LCP, CLS, INP)
- Accessible UI (WCAG AA)
- Headless CMS integration (Storyblok)

Backend:
- Node.js, Express, REST APIs
- GraphQL (Apollo)
- Real-time systems with Socket.io
- Python

Cloud & DevOps:
- Microsoft Azure, Vercel
- GitHub Actions, CI/CD pipelines

Engineering Practices:
- Spec-Driven Development (SDD)
- Performance-focused architecture
- Reusable component design

## Notable Work

- Contributed to migration of multiple legacy brand websites into a unified Next.js architecture
- Improved Core Web Vitals by refactoring data-fetching logic and eliminating redundant API requests
- Implemented CDN-based image optimisation to reduce LCP
- Developed features for a production passenger mobile application using React Native
- Built a full-stack real-time collaborative code editor (Node.js, Socket.io, GraphQL, MongoDB)
- Experience deploying applications to cloud environments (Azure, Vercel)

## Interests

- Serverless and edge-first architectures
- High-performance web applications
- Scalable full-stack product development
